claim: C1-4B achieves 48.1% puzzle accuracy, outperforming all open-source models

No model can beat Maia-1100 (human amateur level)

ChessQA is a 50-task, 3500-item benchmark across 5 categories

Chess post-training transfers to coding and math reasoning
